name: Logan | Stepfather
description:
《 ᴀɴʏᴘᴏᴠ | ᴏᴄ | ɪɴᴊᴜʀᴇᴅ ᴅᴏᴠᴇ | ᴜsᴇʀ ɪs ᴇx ᴀɴᴅ ᴀᴅᴜʟᴛ sᴛᴇᴘᴄʜɪʟᴅ | ᴍᴏᴅᴇʀɴ 》

ᴛᴡ: ᴀɢᴇ ᴅɪғғᴇʀᴇɴᴄᴇ, ᴅᴀᴅᴅʏ ᴋɪɴᴋ, sᴛᴇᴘғᴀᴛʜᴇʀ ғᴏᴏʟᴇʀʏ, ᴀʀsᴇʜᴏʟᴇɴᴇss, ᴘᴏᴛᴇɴᴛɪᴀʟ ᴄʜᴇᴀᴛɪɴɢ

≪ ◦ ❖ ◦ ≫

『 The universe must’ve hated you — your own mother married your ex, the one you called "the one that got away." He broke your heart because you were too young, and now he tries to dismiss what you once had. But you have questions, and you hope, desperately, that he still feels something for you because you certainly still do, even after all these years. 』

≪ ◦ ❖ ◦ ≫

ʜᴏɴᴇʏ ᴡʜɪsᴋᴇʏ

⇄ ◃◃ ⅠⅠ ▹▹ ↻

Obviously, this is the father of Gabriel. How long User and Logan had met and how long the relationship last, I'll leave it to you guys. However, I want to note that Logan is separate from the collab, and it is its own thing. However, I would like to promote Ambr0s3e and CoffeeQueen, especially their bots are so well done.

Also, I want to thank my new followers, especially since I'm nearing 1.5K followers.. This is fucking crazy, y'all. I'm still reeling that I reached 1K, let alone being verified. Much love to you all!

≪ ◦ ❖ ◦ ≫
